hero.title: Ana Clara
hero.subtitle: Architecture born from research.
hero.description: Architectural design, interiors, renovations and consulting in Conselheiro Lafaiete and the surrounding region.

about.label: About
about.title: The mind behind every project
about.description: I am an architect and urban planner graduated from UFOP, with a master's degree and currently pursuing a doctorate at UFV. My master's thesis studied 48 years of urban transformation in Conselheiro Lafaiete, from 1970 to 2018. This research shaped my perspective: every project I design carries a deep understanding of the place where it will be built.
about.description2: Since 2020, I also serve as a substitute professor at UFV's Architecture and Urbanism Department, which keeps me constantly updated and connected to the next generation of professionals.
about.imageAlt: Work desk with architectural projects by Ana Clara

projetos.name: Architectural Design
projetos.description: Residential and commercial projects designed from research and urban context analysis, with attention to functionality, aesthetics and sustainability.

interiores.name: Interior Design
interiores.description: Spaces planned with sensitivity and technical rigor, translating each client's personality into environments that welcome and inspire.

reformas.name: Renovations
reformas.description: Complete technical oversight of renovations, from conception to execution, ensuring quality and compliance with building codes.

consultorias.name: Consulting
consultorias.description: Technical guidance for those who need professional direction on architecture, urbanism and building regulations.

quote.text: Designing for a city you have studied for years is different. Every line carries the understanding of who this city was, and the vision of who it can become.
quote.author: Ana Clara de Souza Pereira
